stemHtml: An aircraft is equipped with a DME receiver that provides a ground speed read-out. It is being flown at FL70 and is currently crossing radial 090 from a VOR DME station at an indicated DME range of 20 NM. The aircraft is flying in a north-easterly direction. The ground speed shown on the DME display is...

options.a: accurate as the change in slant range gives an accurate measurement of the ground speed.
options.b: inaccurate as the aircraft is at an insufficient height and distance from the station to give a correct calculation of the ground speed.
options.c: inaccurate as the aircraft is crossing the radials rather than flying an inbound or outbound radial.
options.d: accurate as the aircraft is at a sufficient height and distance from the station for a correct calculation of the ground distance.
